page_metadata.biotools__summary: Retrieval program with a graphical user interface for ACNUC databases . It can query any ACNUC database, e.g., for nucleotide of protein sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Retrieval program with a graphical user interface for ACNUC databases . It can query any ACNUC database, e.g., for nucleotide of protein sequences.
